itinerary.title: Punjab Explorer
itinerary.overview:
PUNJAB EXPLORER • THE LAND OF GOLDEN DESIRES & ROYAL LEGACIES

Welcome to a grand, multi-sensory voyage crafted by TRAGUIN. Embark on the finest Punjab Family Tour engineered to uncover breathtaking landscapes, deep spiritual heritage, grand royal history, and unmatched legendary hospitality. As your premium travel consultants, TRAGUIN has curated a seamless luxury holiday itinerary combining premium stays, iconic attractions, and soulful culinary trails. From the timeless divine glow of Amritsar to the grand architectural marvels of Patiala and the futuristic master planning of Chandigarh, every moment creates unforgettable memories for your family.

TOUR OVERVIEW
This custom-tailored itinerary by TRAGUIN promises a perfect mix of cultural immersion, historical enlightenment, and elite luxury. Travelling across the fertile heartland of Punjab in a highly comfortable, chauffeur-driven premium vehicle, your family will experience flawless ground logistics. Your package includes a carefully planned meal itinerary featuring majestic buffet breakfasts and specialized local fine-dining dinners. Every single detail includes our signature touch of TRAGUIN curated experiences, ensuring fast-track entries, private guides, and round-the-clock tailored assistance.

WHY VISIT PUNJAB? AN SEO DESTINATION INSIGHT
When planning a Luxury Punjab Holiday, travelers search for deep cultural connection, iconic architecture, and unforgettable gastronomy. Punjab holds some of the most globally recognized spots in India. From the pristine Golden Temple and the historically significant Jallianwala Bagh in Amritsar to the grand palaces of Patiala, Punjab sightseeing presents endless options for families and couples alike. For families and newlyweds browsing an unforgettable Punjab Honeymoon Package or a grand Punjab Family Tour, the region offers incredibly vivid and popular Instagram locations like rural mustard fields, pristine wetlands, magnificent heritage forts, and vibrant local bazaars. Whether it is luxury shopping for genuine Phulkari dresses, experiencing the legendary hospitality of farm stays, or exploring the unique rock structures in Chandigarh, our specialized TRAGUIN Punjab Packages promise handpicked hotels, elite comfort, and exclusive experiences during the best time to visit Punjab.
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 06 Nights / 07 Days Punjab package (PB-010 / TRG-PB-010): Amritsar • Jalandhar • Ludhiana • Patiala • Chandigarh with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 01: ARRIVAL IN AMRITSAR — WELCOME TO THE HOLY CITY – GOLDEN SPLENDOR & SPIRITUAL AWAKENING
Day 02: AMRITSAR SIGHTSEEING & WAGAH BORDER — HISTORIC VALOR, PATRIOTIC PRIDE & RURAL ESSENCE
Day 03: AMRITSAR TO JALANDHAR VIA KAPURTHALA — THE PARIS OF PUNJAB – ROYAL ARCHITECTURE & INDUSTRIAL HERITAGE
Day 04: JALANDHAR TO PATIALA VIA LUDHIANA — THE PULSE OF TEXTILES & STRIDING INTO THE PRINCELY STATE
Day 05: PATIALA ROYAL EXPLORATION TO CHANDIGARH — ROYAL PALACES, SPECTACULAR ARCHITECTURE & TRANSITION TO MODERNITY
Day 06: CHANDIGARH FULL DAY SIGHTSEEING — MODERN MARVELS, ARTISTIC ESSENCE & SCENIC BEAUTY
Day 07: CHANDIGARH TO DELHI / DEPARTURE — CHERISHING UNFORGETTABLE MEMORIES BEYOND DESTINATIONS
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Private family historical briefing and storytelling before visiting the Golden Temple.
Curated by TRAGUIN Experts: Handpicked travel routes minimizing highway transit times and prioritizing family leisure.
Premium Handpicked Hotels: Properties tested rigorously for high-class safety, premium views, and rich hospitality.
Luxury Transportation: Highly experienced, polite local drivers well-versed with the premium photography points.

days.title: ARRIVAL IN AMRITSAR — WELCOME TO THE HOLY CITY – GOLDEN SPLENDOR & SPIRITUAL AWAKENING
days.description: Your premium Punjab experience starts with a warm welcome at Amritsar Airport or Railway Station, where a private luxury vehicle awaits to take your family to your premium hotel. After check-in and fresh relaxation time, head out for a deeply moving evening visit to the Sri Harmandir Sahib (Golden Temple). Witness the majestic shrine illuminated flawlessly under the starlit night sky, casting its golden shadow across the holy Amrit Sarovar lake.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Golden Temple evening experience, local heritage streets walkway.
Evening Experience: Traditional Langar sewa experience or high-end elite dining curated by TRAGUIN experts.
Overnight Stay: Amritsar (Premium / Luxury Handpicked Hotel)
Meals Included: Welcome Drinks & Premium Dinner

days.title: AMRITSAR SIGHTSEEING & WAGAH BORDER — HISTORIC VALOR, PATRIOTIC PRIDE & RURAL ESSENCE
days.description: Relish a decadent breakfast before exploring the poignant history at Jallianwala Bagh and the unique Partition Museum. In the afternoon, embark on an exclusive drive to the Wagah Border for the legendary Beating Retreat Ceremony. Feel the patriotic energy rise high in the air as Indian and Pakistani border forces execute their precise maneuvers. Return via a stop at a curated local farm space for premium rural photography points.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Jallianwala Bagh, Partition Museum, Wagah Border VIP seats, Gobindgarh Fort.
Optional Activities: Authentic food tasting trail for legendary Amritsari Kulchas with hand-churned butter.
Overnight Stay: Amritsar (Premium / Luxury Handpicked Hotel)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Luxury Dinner

days.title: AMRITSAR TO JALANDHAR VIA KAPURTHALA — THE PARIS OF PUNJAB – ROYAL ARCHITECTURE & INDUSTRIAL HERITAGE
days.description: Depart Amritsar for Jalandhar, making an exclusive stop at Kapurthala—famed as the 'Paris of Punjab'. Admire the spectacular Jagatjit Palace, modeled entirely after the Palace of Versailles. Arrive in Jalandhar, an energetic hub of sports manufacturing and deep cultural antiquity. Check into your premium stay and spend a relaxed evening exploring high-end culinary avenues and local craft spaces.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Jagatjit Palace, Elysee Palace, Moorish Mosque, Jalandhar Devi Talab Mandir.
Evening Experience: Private heritage brief session and handpicked multi-course dining menu.
Overnight Stay: Jalandhar (Premium Selected Business Luxury Stay)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Dinner

days.title: JALANDHAR TO PATIALA VIA LUDHIANA — THE PULSE OF TEXTILES & STRIDING INTO THE PRINCELY STATE
days.description: Enjoy an early breakfast and travel through Ludhiana, stopping to explore the unique Rural Heritage Museum at PAU. Continue your private premium journey towards Patiala, the historic princely city celebrated globally for its royal style and royal traditions. Upon arrival, check into your boutique heritage property or premium hotel and soak in the old-world royal charm.
activities: Sightseeing Included: PAU Rural Museum, Maharaja Ranjit Singh War Museum, Patiala evening lanes.
Evening Experience: Exclusive royal walk inside the older bazaars for authentic parandas and juttis.
Overnight Stay: Patiala (Boutique Heritage / Premium Luxury Stay)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Royal Patiala Dinner

days.title: PATIALA ROYAL EXPLORATION TO CHANDIGARH — ROYAL PALACES, SPECTACULAR ARCHITECTURE & TRANSITION TO MODERNITY
days.description: Immerse yourself in Patiala's princely past. Explore the massive Qila Mubarak Complex, a stunning specimen of Sikh palace architecture. Witness the gorgeous Sheesh Mahal (Palace of Mirrors), glittering with fine glasswork panels. Late afternoon, take a smooth highway drive to Chandigarh, India's most organized and clean city. Check into your ultra-luxury accommodation.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Qila Mubarak, Sheesh Mahal, Baradari Gardens, Moti Bagh Palace exterior views.
Evening Experience: Premium leisure lounge visit or high-end lifestyle dining at Sector 17/26.
Overnight Stay: Chandigarh (Premium / Ultra Luxury Hotel)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Exquisite Buffet Dinner

days.title: CHANDIGARH FULL DAY SIGHTSEEING — MODERN MARVELS, ARTISTIC ESSENCE & SCENIC BEAUTY
days.description: Spend a beautiful day enjoying the incredible planning and scenic beauty of Chandigarh. Take your family on an interactive tour of the world-famous Rock Garden, meticulously sculpted using urban discarded elements by Nek Chand. Visit the nearby Rose Garden and enjoy an exclusive sunset boat cruise across the pristine waters of Sukhna Lake, perfect for capture-worthy family photographs.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Nek Chand's Rock Garden, Zakir Hussain Rose Garden, Sukhna Lake Promenade.
Optional Activities: High-end retail shopping for exquisite regional luxury fabrics and art.
Overnight Stay: Chandigarh (Premium / Ultra Luxury Hotel)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Farewell Special Dinner

days.title: CHANDIGARH TO DELHI / DEPARTURE — CHERISHING UNFORGETTABLE MEMORIES BEYOND DESTINATIONS
days.description: Partake in a final gourmet buffet breakfast at your luxury property. Your private chauffeur will drive you safely along the clean national highway back to New Delhi Airport or Chandigarh Airport for your return flights. Head home with a heart filled with joy, rich bonds, and unforgettable memories designed flawlessly by TRAGUIN.
activities: Transfers Included: Private luxury airport or railway station drop-off service.
Meals Included: Sumptuous Buffet Breakfast
